author: doll-agent
content:
Done. data_mut returned &mut Array<T, D>, exposing every mutating method including reshape - would silently desynchronize data length from mask length, breaking the masked-array invariant.

Tightened the signature to Option<&mut [T]> via Array::as_slice_mut. Callers can update element values but cannot change shape. Returns None for non-contiguous layouts.

No callers in the workspace use the old &mut Array form (verified via grep). Test added: data_mut_only_exposes_element_slice.

ferray-ma: 196 -> 197 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit c265c278.
